public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as river pilot.
manner: Thinks in movement, timing, and obstacle management, treating delay as a concrete threat. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a river pilot still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of river pilot in and around Ashwake Harbor Lane, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ashwake Harbor Lane workable through the obligations of river pilot while managing the immediate pressure of eruption risk in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep movement possible despite weather, chokepoints, rumor, and shifting authority. Around Ashwake Harbor Lane, that usually means carrying eruption risk, resource access, underworld danger without letting the role of river pilot visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Morra Glassmelt will share route intelligence, hidden timing, or safer alternatives if the party proves useful under travel pressure.
Morra Glassmelt needs help reading a blocked path, escorting traffic, or reopening safe movement through Ashwake Harbor Lane.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Travel kit, route marks, and timing-focused movement signal that Morra Glassmelt lives by roads, passages, or convoy rhythm.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ashwake Harbor Lane: roads, caravan nodes, docks, ferries, route desks, or loading seams
who_avoids_them: those who do not respect route discipline
